creator: ggm@algebras.org
text:
The problem occurs with either radeonkms.ko or amdgpu.ko loaded. I have tried both paths, and alternates for xf86-video, I only sent one stacktrace but I am confident the crash happens without amdgpu.ko loaded.

If it is possible to "talk" to the card without some .ko loaded, I can try that as well. Modesetting configuration says "no screen found" so I suspect not.
